deliverables: Design narrative — clinical workflow and patient experience
Preliminary zone diagrams (clinical, waiting, staff, clean/dirty corridors)
Site placement and ambulance access concept
Space arrangement diagram all programmed zones
COFEPRIS facility category confirmed with client
phases.milestone: Client written approval of conceptual direction and clinical zoning concept

deliverables: Site plan with ambulance drop-off and accessible parking
phases.milestone: Client written approval + COFEPRIS pre-consultation complete

deliverables: Structural engineering drawings integrated with architectural set
Electrical single-line diagram with emergency power and backup generator
Clinical lighting layout per COFEPRIS NOM standards
HVAC system design — pressure differential zoning, filtration, equipment schedules
Medical gas systems: oxygen, medical air, vacuum — piping, valves, alarms
Plumbing and hydraulic layout with medical-grade hand-washing stations
phases.milestone: All engineering disciplines coordinated; medical gas design complete

deliverables: Detail sheets (wall sections, clean corridor details, lab casework, hand-washing station details)
Finish schedule with infection control surface ratings
Door and window schedule with hardware specifications
phases.milestone: COFEPRIS permit-ready executive plans delivered to client (M4 payment trigger)

deliverables: Bid package sent to minimum 3 contractors with COFEPRIS clinical construction experience
Bid comparison matrix with clinical experience assessment
phases.milestone: Contractor selected and approved by client

phases.phase_name: Permitting — Building Permit + COFEPRIS Licencia Sanitaria
deliverables: Building permit application (Municipio de La Paz)
All permit corrections managed to resolution
phases.milestone: COFEPRIS Licencia Sanitaria and building permit obtained (M5 payment trigger)

note: COFEPRIS Licencia Sanitaria processing is the most variable timeline element. Phase 6 duration estimated at 23 weeks; actual timeline set by COFEPRIS delegación BCS.
